programme.title: BKFC 41
programme.desc: Features Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, Eddie Alvarez vs. Chad Mendes, plus Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings for BKFC women's flyweight title from Broomfield, Colo. From April 29, 2023.

programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Eddie Alvarez, middleweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Maverik Center in Salt Lake City.

programme.desc: John Dodson vs. Joshua Ridge, flyweight championship bout; Joshua Moreno vs. Jeremy Sauceda, middleweight bout. From Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Bryan Duran, featherweight title bout; Keith Richardson vs. Alberto Blas, championship bout; Jared Warren vs. Jomi Escoboza, light heavyweight title bout. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Explore An Austin Musician's Bohemian Bungalow
programme.desc: Scott Ballew is a filmmaker and songwriter who owns a Bohemian bungalow in the heart of Austin’s first suburb.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson sets out to explore the adventurous sides of La Paz, Mexico and Lafayette, Louisiana.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson sets out to explore the adventurous sides of Lexington, Kentucky and Whistler, Canada.
